description: Configure a multi-architecture build pipeline using Docker Buildx and a local registry. Build the Go application located at /home/ga/edge-app/ for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 platforms using a Buildx builder instance with the 'docker-container' driver. The resulting multi-architecture image must be pushed to a local registry running on port 5000 at localhost:5000/edge-app:latest. Ensure the builder is configured to communicate with the registry.
